name: morning-briefing
description: Git log summary at session start, once per day
prompt:
It's {time} on {date}. Give me a morning briefing:
1. Run `git log --oneline --since='yesterday 6pm' --author=$(git config user.email) 2>/dev/null | head -20` and summarize what I worked on.
2. Check if there's a todo.md, TASKS.md, or similar in the current directory. If so, note anything marked urgent or in-progress.
3. Three bullets: what I shipped yesterday, what's in flight, suggested first task today.
Be concise. If git log is empty, say so briefly.
